title: ferray-fft: ND FFT applies transforms sequentially per axis — no simultaneous multi-axis transform
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

fftn_impl applies 1D FFTs sequentially along each axis: for a 3D FFT, it does axis-0, then axis-1, then axis-2, creating intermediate full-size arrays at each step. NumPy's pocketfft also does this (separable ND FFT via iterated 1D), so this is at parity. However, for specific shapes, algorithms like row-column decomposition with shared memory or Bluestein's could be faster. Low priority since the sequential approach is correct and standard.
